examples: The code-named Natty Narwhal, Ubuntu 11.04 is slated for release in April 2011.
His cap was a dainty thing, his close-buttoned blue cloth roundabout was new and natty, and so were his pantaloons.
The ship boasts some very natty state-of-the-art hardware such as 3D holograms and projections.
There's the natty problem that he may become the next prime minister of the Netherlands, but nevermind.
